info.title: Apollo API
info.description: Apollo API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

post.description: Enrich a single person with Apollo's contact and company data; optionally trigger waterfall email/phone enrichment and reveal personal emails or phone numbers. Provide as many identifying parameters (name, email, domain, LinkedIn URL, Apollo id) as possible to improve match accuracy.

parameters.name: first_name
parameters.description: Person's first name; pair with last_name to identify by full name when no email or id is available.

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.description: Person's last name; pair with first_name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Full name as an alternative to sending first_name and last_name separately.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Person's email address; the strongest single signal for an accurate match.

parameters.name: hashed_email
parameters.description:
Hashed email used to match without sending the plaintext address.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 MD5 与 SHA-256 之外的取值，详细哈希规范待研发确认。]

parameters.name: organization_name
parameters.description: Name of the person's employer (current or past), used to disambiguate matches.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Web domain of the person's employer (current or past), used to disambiguate matches.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Apollo identifier of the person.

parameters.name: linkedin_url
parameters.description: URL of the person's LinkedIn profile; a strong matching signal.

parameters.name: run_waterfall_email
parameters.description: Enable waterfall email enrichment, which queries additional data sources to find an email.

parameters.name: run_waterfall_phone
parameters.description: Enable waterfall phone enrichment, which queries additional data sources to find a phone number.

parameters.name: reveal_personal_emails
parameters.description: Include the person's personal emails in the result; may consume extra credits.

parameters.name: reveal_phone_number
parameters.description: Include all available phone numbers in the result; when enabled, webhook_url becomes required because numbers are delivered asynchronously.

parameters.name: webhook_url
parameters.description: Callback URL that receives revealed phone numbers asynchronously; required when reveal_phone_number is enabled.

person.description: Enriched profile of the matched person.

waterfall.description: Status and results of any waterfall email/phone enrichment that was triggered.

post.description: Enrich up to 10 people in one call by passing an array of person records. Returns per-record match results plus aggregate counts of how many records were enriched and how many credits were spent.

parameters.name: run_waterfall_email
parameters.description: Enable waterfall email enrichment for every record in the batch.

parameters.name: run_waterfall_phone
parameters.description: Enable waterfall phone enrichment for every record in the batch.

parameters.name: reveal_personal_emails
parameters.description: Include personal emails for every record; may consume extra credits.

parameters.name: reveal_phone_number
parameters.description: Include all phone numbers for every record; requires webhook_url for asynchronous delivery.

parameters.name: webhook_url
parameters.description: Callback URL receiving revealed phone numbers; required when reveal_phone_number is enabled.

status.description: Overall processing status of the bulk request.

error_code.description: Error code when the request failed; absent on success.

error_message.description: Human-readable error detail when the request failed.

total_requested_enrichments.description: Number of enrichments requested in this call.

unique_enriched_records.description: Number of distinct records that were successfully enriched.

missing_records.description: Number of records that could not be matched.

credits_consumed.description: Credits spent on this bulk enrichment.

matches.description: Per-record enrichment results, aligned to the input order.

waterfall.description: Aggregate status of waterfall enrichment across the batch.

details.description: Array of person records to enrich, one object per person, up to 10.

get.description: Enrich a single company by its web domain, returning Apollo's full organization profile.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Web domain of the company to enrich, e.g. apollo.io.

post.description: Enrich up to 10 companies in one call by passing multiple domains. Returns matched organization profiles plus counts of requested, unique, enriched, and missing records.

parameters.name: domains[]
parameters.description: Company domains to enrich, up to 10 per call.

status.description: Overall processing status of the bulk request.

error_code.description: Error code when the request failed; absent on success.

error_message.description: Human-readable error detail when the request failed.

total_requested_domains.description: Number of domains submitted in this call.

unique_domains.description: Number of distinct domains after deduplication.

unique_enriched_records.description: Number of distinct companies successfully enriched.

missing_records.description: Number of domains that could not be matched.

organizations.description: Enriched company profiles, one per matched domain.

post.description: Find net-new people in the Apollo database using filters such as job title, seniority, location, employer attributes, and technologies used. Results are paginated; combine filters to narrow the audience.

parameters.name: person_titles[]
parameters.description: Job titles to match; a person is included if their current title matches any value.

parameters.name: include_similar_titles
parameters.description: Also include people whose titles are similar to those you listed, broadening the audience.

parameters.name: q_keywords
parameters.description: Free-text keywords used to further filter results.

parameters.name: person_locations[]
parameters.description: Locations where people live; matches across cities, US states, and countries.

parameters.name: person_seniorities[]
parameters.description: Seniority levels held at the current employer, to target by org level.

parameters.name: organization_locations[]
parameters.description: Headquarters location of a person's current employer.

parameters.name: q_organization_domains_list[]
parameters.description: Employer web domains to match (current or past employer).

parameters.name: contact_email_status[]
parameters.description: Email verification statuses to include, used to control match quality.

parameters.name: organization_ids[]
parameters.description: Apollo company ids whose employees should be included.

parameters.name: organization_num_employees_ranges[]
parameters.description: Employee-count ranges of the current employer, to target by company size.

parameters.name: revenue_range[min]
parameters.description: Minimum revenue of the current employer; pair with revenue_range[max].

parameters.name: revenue_range[max]
parameters.description: Maximum revenue of the current employer; pair with revenue_range[min].

parameters.name: currently_using_all_of_technology_uids[]
parameters.description: Match employers using all of the listed technologies (AND).

parameters.name: currently_using_any_of_technology_uids[]
parameters.description: Match employers using any of the listed technologies (OR).

parameters.name: currently_not_using_any_of_technology_uids[]
parameters.description: Exclude employers using any of the listed technologies.

parameters.name: q_organization_job_titles[]
parameters.description: Job titles appearing in the employer's active job postings.

parameters.name: organization_job_locations[]
parameters.description: Locations of jobs the employer is actively recruiting for.

parameters.name: organization_num_jobs_range[min]
parameters.description: Minimum number of active job postings at the employer.

parameters.name: organization_num_jobs_range[max]
parameters.description: Maximum number of active job postings at the employer.

parameters.name: organization_job_posted_at_range[min]
parameters.description: Earliest job-posting date at the employer; pair with the max bound.

parameters.name: organization_job_posted_at_range[max]
parameters.description: Latest job-posting date at the employer; pair with the min bound.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve, used with per_page for pagination.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page; lowering it can speed up responses.

total_entries.description: Total number of people matching the filters across all pages.

post.description: Find companies in the Apollo database using filters such as domain, headcount range, location, revenue, funding, technologies, and active job postings. Results are paginated.

parameters.name: q_organization_domains_list[]
parameters.description: Company web domains to match.

parameters.name: organization_num_employees_ranges[]
parameters.description: Employee-count ranges to target by company size.

parameters.name: organization_locations[]
parameters.description: Company headquarters locations to include.

parameters.name: organization_not_locations[]
parameters.description: Company headquarters locations to exclude.

parameters.name: revenue_range[min]
parameters.description: Minimum company revenue; pair with revenue_range[max].

parameters.name: revenue_range[max]
parameters.description: Maximum company revenue; pair with revenue_range[min].

parameters.name: currently_using_any_of_technology_uids[]
parameters.description: Match companies using any of the listed technologies.

parameters.name: q_organization_keyword_tags[]
parameters.description: Keyword tags describing the company's industry or focus.

parameters.name: q_organization_name
parameters.description: Filter by company name.

parameters.name: organization_ids[]
parameters.description: Apollo company ids to include.

parameters.name: latest_funding_amount_range[min]
parameters.description: Minimum amount of the company's most recent funding round.

parameters.name: latest_funding_amount_range[max]
parameters.description: Maximum amount of the company's most recent funding round.

parameters.name: total_funding_range[min]
parameters.description: Minimum total funding raised by the company.

parameters.name: total_funding_range[max]
parameters.description: Maximum total funding raised by the company.

parameters.name: latest_funding_date_range[min]
parameters.description: Earliest date of the company's most recent funding; pair with the max bound.

parameters.name: latest_funding_date_range[max]
parameters.description: Latest date of the company's most recent funding; pair with the min bound.

parameters.name: q_organization_job_titles[]
parameters.description: Job titles appearing in the company's active job postings.

parameters.name: organization_job_locations[]
parameters.description: Locations of jobs the company is actively recruiting for.

parameters.name: organization_num_jobs_range[min]
parameters.description: Minimum number of active job postings at the company.

parameters.name: organization_num_jobs_range[max]
parameters.description: Maximum number of active job postings at the company.

parameters.name: organization_job_posted_at_range[min]
parameters.description: Earliest job-posting date at the company; pair with the max bound.

parameters.name: organization_job_posted_at_range[max]
parameters.description: Latest job-posting date at the company; pair with the min bound.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve, used with per_page for pagination.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page; lowering it can speed up responses.

breadcrumbs.description: Applied-filter breadcrumbs echoing how the result set was narrowed.

partial_results_only.description: Whether only a partial result set was returned.

has_join.description:
Internal flag indicating a join was applied to the query.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该字段的业务含义，待研发确认。]

disable_eu_prospecting.description: Whether EU prospecting was disabled for this query, per compliance settings.

partial_results_limit.description: The cap that triggered partial results, when applicable.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

accounts.description: Matching companies already saved as accounts in your CRM.

organizations.description: Matching companies from the Apollo database.

model_ids.description:
Identifiers of the records backing the results.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该字段的业务含义，待研发确认。]

num_fetch_result.description: Number of records fetched for this page.

derived_params.description: Query parameters Apollo derived from your input.

get.description: Retrieve the current active job postings for a given organization, useful for identifying hiring signals and growth areas.

parameters.name: organization_id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the company whose job postings you want.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve, used with per_page for pagination.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page; lowering it can speed up responses.

organization_job_postings.description: The company's current active job postings.

get.description: Retrieve the complete profile of an organization by its Apollo id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the organization to retrieve.

post.description: Find news articles tied to companies in the Apollo database, optionally filtered by organization, category, and publish-date window. Results are paginated.

parameters.name: organization_ids[]
parameters.description: Apollo company ids whose news you want.

parameters.name: categories[]
parameters.description:
News categories to filter by, such as funding or leadership changes.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明完整的类别取值，待研发确认。]

parameters.name: published_at[min]
parameters.description: Earliest publish date; pair with published_at[max].

parameters.name: published_at[max]
parameters.description: Latest publish date; pair with published_at[min].

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve, used with per_page for pagination.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page; lowering it can speed up responses.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

news_articles.description: The page of matching news articles.

post.description: Create a new account (a company saved in your team's CRM). Duplicate domains are rejected. Requires a master API key.

domain.description: Account's primary web domain; must be unique, duplicates are rejected.

owner_id.description: Apollo user id to assign as the account owner.

account_stage_id.description: Id of the stage to place the account in.

patch.description: Update fields on an existing account identified by account_id. Only the fields you send are changed. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the account to update.

owner_id.description: New account owner's Apollo user id.

account_stage_id.description: New stage id for the account.

raw_address.description: Free-text postal address for the account.

typed_custom_fields.description: Custom-field values to set, keyed by field id.

post.description: Create multiple accounts in one call. The response separates records newly created from those that already existed. Requires a master API key.

created_accounts.description: Accounts newly created by this call.

created_accounts[].team_id.description: Id of the team that owns this account.

created_accounts[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the account owner.

created_accounts[].account_stage_id.description: Id of the account's current stage.

created_accounts[].created_at.description: Timestamp when the account was created.

created_accounts[].updated_at.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated.

existing_accounts.description: Accounts that already existed and were matched instead of created.

existing_accounts[].team_id.description: Id of the team that owns this account.

existing_accounts[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the account owner.

existing_accounts[].account_stage_id.description: Id of the account's current stage.

existing_accounts[].created_at.description: Timestamp when the account was created.

existing_accounts[].updated_at.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated.

accounts.description: Array of account objects to create.

append_label_names.description: Label names to attach to every created account.

run_dedupe.description: Run deduplication so existing accounts are reused instead of duplicated.

post.description: Update multiple accounts in one call by pairing account_ids with the attributes to change. Supports asynchronous processing. Requires a master API key.

accounts[].id.description: Apollo id of the updated account.

accounts[].account_stage_id.description: Account's stage id after the update.

account_ids.description: Ids of the accounts to update.

account_attributes.description: Attribute values applied to the targeted accounts.

account_attributes[].owner_id.description: New owner's Apollo user id to apply.

async.description: Process the update asynchronously rather than waiting for completion.

post.description: Search your team's accounts by name, stage, and label, with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.

account_stage_ids.description: Only include accounts in these stages.

account_label_ids.description: Only include accounts carrying these labels.

sort_by_field.description: Field to sort the results by.

sort_ascending.description: Sort ascending when true, descending when false.

get.description: Retrieve a single account by its id. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the account to retrieve.

post.summary: Update Account Owner for Multiple Accounts
post.description: Reassign the owner of multiple accounts at once. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: account_ids[]
parameters.description: Ids of the accounts to reassign.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: Apollo user id of the new owner for all listed accounts.

accounts.description: The accounts whose owner was changed.

accounts[].owner_id.description: Account owner's Apollo user id after the change.

accounts[].crm_owner_id.description: Corresponding owner id in the connected CRM, when synced.

get.description: List all account stages configured for your team. Use the returned ids to set or filter account_stage_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.

account_stages.description: The list of configured account stages.

account_stages[].id.description: Stage id; use it to set or filter account_stage_id.

account_stages[].team_id.description: Id of the team that owns the stage.

account_stages[].display_name.description: Stage name shown in the Apollo UI.

account_stages[].display_order.description: Position of the stage in the ordered pipeline.

account_stages[].default_exclude_for_lea.description: Whether accounts in this stage are excluded from lead generation by default.

account_stages[].category.description:
Category the stage belongs to.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该字段的取值集合，待研发确认。]

account_stages[].is_meeting_set.description: Whether this stage represents a meeting having been set.

post.description: Create a new contact (a person saved in your team's CRM). Requires a master API key.

account_id.description: Apollo id of the account to link this contact to.

label_names.description: Labels to apply to the contact.

contact_stage_id.description: Id of the stage to place the contact in.

typed_custom_fields.description: Custom-field values to set, keyed by field id.

run_dedupe.description: Run deduplication so an existing matching contact is reused instead of duplicated.

get.description: Retrieve a single contact by its id. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the contact to retrieve.

contact.phone_numbers[].sanitized_number.description: Phone number normalized to a standard format.

contact.owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the contact owner.

contact.account_id.description: Apollo id of the linked account.

contact.linkedin_url.description: URL of the contact's LinkedIn profile.

contact.updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated.

patch.description: Update fields on an existing contact identified by contact_id. Only the fields you send are changed. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the contact to update.

contact.owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the contact owner.

contact.account_id.description: Apollo id of the linked account.

account_id.description: Apollo id of the account to link this contact to.

label_names.description: Labels to apply to the contact.

contact_stage_id.description: Id of the stage to place the contact in.

typed_custom_fields.description: Custom-field values to set, keyed by field id.

post.description: Create multiple contacts in one call. The response separates records newly created from those that already existed. Requires a master API key.

created_contacts.description: Contacts newly created by this call.

created_contacts[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the contact owner.

created_contacts[].account_id.description: Apollo id of the linked account.

created_contacts[].updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated.

existing_contacts.description: Contacts that already existed and were matched instead of created.

existing_contacts[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the contact owner.

existing_contacts[].account_id.description: Apollo id of the linked account.

existing_contacts[].updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated.

contacts.description: Array of contact objects to create.

append_label_names.description: Label names to attach to every created contact.

run_dedupe.description: Run deduplication so existing contacts are reused instead of duplicated.

post.description: Update multiple contacts in one call. Requires a master API key.

contacts[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the contact owner.

contacts[].account_id.description: Apollo id of the linked account.

contacts[].linkedin_url.description: URL of the contact's LinkedIn profile.

contacts[].updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated.

post.description: Search your team's contacts by keyword, stage, and label, with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.

q_keywords.description: Free-text keywords to filter contacts by.

contact_stage_ids.description: Only include contacts in these stages.

contact_label_ids.description: Only include contacts carrying these labels.

sort_by_field.description: Field to sort the results by.

sort_ascending.description: Sort ascending when true, descending when false.

post.summary: Update Contact Stage for Multiple Contacts
post.description: Move multiple contacts to a single contact stage at once. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: contact_ids[]
parameters.description: Ids of the contacts to move.

parameters.name: contact_stage_id
parameters.description: Id of the stage to move all listed contacts into.

contacts.description: The contacts whose stage was changed.

contacts[].contact_stage_id.description: Contact's stage id after the change.

contacts[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the contact owner.

post.summary: Update Contact Owner for Multiple Contacts
post.description: Reassign the owner of multiple contacts at once. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: contact_ids[]
parameters.description: Ids of the contacts to reassign.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: Apollo user id of the new owner for all listed contacts.

contacts.description: The contacts whose owner was changed.

contacts[].owner_id.description: Contact owner's Apollo user id after the change.

contacts[].crm_owner_id.description: Corresponding owner id in the connected CRM, when synced.

get.description: List all contact stages configured for your team. Use the returned ids to set or filter contact_stage_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.

contact_stages.description: The list of configured contact stages.

contact_stages[].id.description: Stage id; use it to set or filter contact_stage_id.

contact_stages[].team_id.description: Id of the team that owns the stage.

contact_stages[].display_name.description: Stage name shown in the Apollo UI.

contact_stages[].display_order.description: Position of the stage in the ordered pipeline.

contact_stages[].ignore_trigger_override.description: Whether automation triggers are ignored when contacts enter this stage.

contact_stages[].category.description:
Category the stage belongs to.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该字段的取值集合，待研发确认。]

contact_stages[].is_meeting_set.description: Whether this stage represents a meeting having been set.

post.description: Create a deal (opportunity) tied to an account. Requires a master API key.

owner_id.description: Apollo user id to assign as the deal owner.

account_id.description: Apollo id of the account this deal belongs to.

opportunity_stage_id.description: Id of the stage to place the deal in.

closed_date.description: Expected or actual close date of the deal.

typed_custom_fields.description: Custom-field values to set, keyed by field id.

get.description: List all deals (opportunities), with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: sort_by_field
parameters.description: Field to sort the deals by.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page.

opportunities[].owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the deal owner.

opportunities[].account_id.description: Apollo id of the account the deal belongs to.

opportunities[].opportunity_stage_id.description: Id of the deal's current stage.

opportunities[].is_closed.description: Whether the deal has been closed (won or lost).

opportunities[].created_at.description: Timestamp when the deal was created.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.total_entries.description: Total number of deals across all pages.

get.description: Retrieve a single deal (opportunity) by its id. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: opportunity_id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the deal to retrieve.

opportunity.owner_id.description: Apollo user id of the deal owner.

opportunity.account_id.description: Apollo id of the account the deal belongs to.

opportunity.opportunity_stage_id.description: Id of the deal's current stage.

opportunity.is_closed.description: Whether the deal has been closed (won or lost).

opportunity.created_at.description: Timestamp when the deal was created.

patch.description: Update fields on an existing deal (opportunity). Only the fields you send are changed. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: opportunity_id
parameters.description: Apollo id of the deal to update.

owner_id.description: New deal owner's Apollo user id.

amount.description: New monetary value of the deal.

opportunity_stage_id.description: New stage id for the deal.

closed_date.description: New expected or actual close date.

typed_custom_fields.description: Custom-field values to set, keyed by field id.

get.description: List all deal stages (opportunity stages) configured for your team. Use the returned ids to set or filter opportunity_stage_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.

opportunity_stages.description: The list of configured deal stages.

opportunity_stages[].id.description: Stage id; use it to set or filter opportunity_stage_id.

opportunity_stages[].team_id.description: Id of the team that owns the stage.

opportunity_stages[].display_order.description: Position of the stage in the ordered pipeline.

opportunity_stages[].forecast_category_c.description:
Forecast category this stage rolls up into.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该字段的取值集合，待研发确认。]

opportunity_stages[].is_won.description: Whether reaching this stage means the deal is won.

opportunity_stages[].is_closed.description: Whether reaching this stage means the deal is closed.

opportunity_stages[].probability.description: Win probability associated with this stage.

opportunity_stages[].opportunity_pipelin.description: Id of the pipeline this stage belongs to.

opportunity_stages[].type.description:
Type of the stage.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该字段的取值集合，待研发确认。]

post.description: Search the sequences (emailer campaigns) in your Apollo account by name, with pagination. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: q_name
parameters.description: Filter sequences by name.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

post.description: Add contacts to a sequence by contact ids and/or label names. Several flags let you override safety checks (e.g. allow contacts without email or already active in other sequences). Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: sequence_id
parameters.description: Id of the sequence to add contacts to.

parameters.name: emailer_campaign_id
parameters.description: Same sequence id as in the path; provide as a body alias.

parameters.name: contact_ids[]
parameters.description: Contact ids to add; supply this and/or label_names[].

parameters.name: label_names[]
parameters.description: Label names whose contacts should be added; supply this and/or contact_ids[].

parameters.name: send_email_from_email_account_id
parameters.description: Email account id(s) the sequence should send from.

parameters.name: send_email_from_email_address
parameters.description: Optional from-address alias to send under.

parameters.name: sequence_no_email
parameters.description: Allow adding contacts that have no email address.

parameters.name: sequence_unverified_email
parameters.description: Allow adding contacts whose email is unverified.

parameters.name: sequence_job_change
parameters.description: Allow adding contacts flagged as having changed jobs.

parameters.name: sequence_active_in_other_campaigns
parameters.description: Allow adding contacts already active in other sequences.

parameters.name: sequence_finished_in_other_campaigns
parameters.description: Allow adding contacts already finished in other sequences.

success.description: Whether the contacts were added successfully.

post.summary: Update Contact Status in a Sequence
post.description: Remove or stop contacts in one or more sequences. The mode parameter selects whether to mark as finished, remove, or stop the contacts. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: emailer_campaign_ids[]
parameters.description: Ids of the sequences to act on.

parameters.name: contact_ids[]
parameters.description: Ids of the contacts to remove or stop.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Action to take on the contacts: mark them as finished, remove them, or stop them.

post.description: Activate a sequence so it starts sending. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: sequence_id
parameters.description: Id of the sequence to act on.

emailer_steps.description: The steps of the activated sequence.

post.description: Deactivate a sequence so it stops sending. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: sequence_id
parameters.description: Id of the sequence to act on.

post.description: Archive a sequence: marks it inactive and finishes its contacts. Requires a master API key.

parameters.name: sequence_id
parameters.description: Id of the sequence to act on.

post.description: Run an analytics report synchronously, specifying metrics, grouping dimensions, sorts, filters, and a date range. Requires a master API key.

parameters.description: Maximum call duration in seconds; pair with duration[min].

parameters.description: Minimum call duration in seconds; pair with duration[max].
